---
title: "Resources"
---

## Useful Links

* R for Data Science (Functions): [r4ds.hadley.nz/functions.html](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/functions.html)

* Quarto documentation: [quarto.org/docs/computations/parameters.html](https://quarto.org/docs/computations/parameters.html)

* Ah, Ha, Ha, Ha, Parameterise!: [www.cararthompson.com/talks/ah-ha-ha-ha-parameterise](https://www.cararthompson.com/talks/ah-ha-ha-ha-parameterise/)

* Parameterized presentations: [www.jumpingrivers.com/blog/r-parameterised-presentations-quarto](https://www.jumpingrivers.com/blog/r-parameterised-presentations-quarto/)

* Data science resources: [nrennie.rbind.io/data-science-resources](https://nrennie.rbind.io/data-science-resources/)
